title: Email platform Integration- Iterable
excerpt: We are trying to integrate monday with our email platform, Iterable, so that monday can function as a place for creative and wider team to see performance of our emails. My thought is that through inserting the Iterable …

posts.author: Rheaigarta (Rhea)
posts.cookedHtml: We are trying to integrate monday with our email platform, Iterable, so that monday can function as a place for creative and wider team to see performance of our emails. My thought is that through inserting the Iterable campaign ID, we can pull in the image preview, send volume, open rate, click rate, purchases, etc. — is this a possibility? Too much?

posts.author: GiannisKoukounas (Giannis Koukounas)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Rhea!

What you are describing is possible, though it will require a complex integration. We have done similarly complex integrations in the past, so should you require any professional assistance please feel free to contact as at info@thespelas.com or alternatively schedule a call here .

Wishing you the best of luck in this endeavor!

Cheers,
Giannis, Implementation Consultant at thespelas.com

posts.author: Rheaigarta (Rhea)
posts.cookedHtml: Thank you so much! I will let our team know
